rationale: Educ. Code §39.0302 governs subpoena authority during school district investigations and audits. It contains no provisions relating to property tax exemptions or homestead values, so no conflict arises.
quote: the commissioner may issue a subpoena to compel the attendance of a relevant witness or the production, for inspection or copying, of relevant evidence that is located in this state.
_note: Rule text concerns educator certification and school district investigation subpoena procedures; no nexus to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
